description: Wiping out the whole opponent force (100% removed, >= 75% threshold) with breaking-the-enemy in the common objectives triggers that bonus. Both baggage-trains outcomes fire together (they're not mutually exclusive in the code) and strategic-locations adds the pre-computed strategicLocationVpTotal. Domination is deliberately left out of secondary_objectives, and trophies-of-war out of common_objectives, so their non-zero manualObjectiveState fields (including standardsCaptured) must be ignored.
